data.title: Artemis Gold reports strong financials in Q4 2025 with $237M EBITDA; full year 2025 sees $630M EBITDA, $913.9M revenue, 192,808 ounces of gold produced, and plans for expansion.
data.description: Artemis Gold Inc. (TSXV: ARTG) reported its financial and operating results for Q4 2025 and full year 2025. Highlights include hitting lowest decile in AISC at US$869 per ounce, with EBITDA of $237 million in Q4 2025 and $630 million for the full year. Gold production reached 68,480 ounces in Q4, totaling 192,808 ounces for the year. Q4 sales of 67,852 ounces attracted an average realized price of US$4,168 per ounce. The company had Q4 revenue of $333.7 million and full year revenue of $913.9 million. Construction of Phase 1A expansion is on track, and EP2 expansion decision was announced. Cash and equivalents were $168.1 million at the end of 2025 with a total available liquidity of $410.1 million. Pro-forma available liquidity stood at $852.7 million post bond offering. CEO Dale Andres expressed confidence in the company's growth strategy. Operating results showed impressive figures from Q3 to Q4 2025, depicting the strong performance and growth trajectory of Artemis Gold Inc.
The yield on the 20-year Japanese government bond eased by 0.5 basis points to 2.965%.

data.title: Revel Digital releases AI suite for digital signage with 6 capabilities for content creation, automation, and insights.
data.description: Revel Digital, a prominent cloud-based digital signage platform, has introduced six AI-powered capabilities to enhance natural language content creation, intelligent automation, and real-time network insights within the digital signage industry. This recent announcement marks the general availability of these features, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation.

data.title: Lennard High School in Ruskin, FL partners with Wellpoint and Impact Fitness to unveil new weight room, boosting student fitness access.
data.description: A high school in Ruskin, Florida recently revealed its new weight room in collaboration with Wellpoint and Impact Fitness. The initiative aims to enhance student fitness opportunities and promote healthy habits among the school community. This collaboration is set to benefit numerous students by providing improved access to fitness resources within the school premises. The unveiling marks a significant milestone in promoting physical well-being and overall health among the student population.

data.title: SmartStop completes recast of $500M multi-currency credit facility led by KeyBank, BMO, JPMorgan, and M&T Bank.
data.description: LADERA RANCH, California-- SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. (NYSE: SMA) revealed the successful finalization of a revised senior unsecured credit facility valued at $500 million. Led by KeyBank National Association, Bank of Montreal, JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A., and M&T Bank, the syndicate of banks facilitated this transaction for SmartStop. This internally managed real estate investment trust is renowned for its ownership and operation of self-storage properties across the United States and Canada.

data.title: Paubox wins Best Email Encryption Software in 2026 by G2 Awards, second consecutive year, 100M+ buyers reached annually.
data.description: Paubox, a prominent provider of HIPAA compliant email security, received recognition as the top email encryption software in the 2026 Best Healthcare Software Products Awards by G2. This marks the second year in a row that Paubox has achieved this accolade, with the awards determined solely through verified user reviews. G2, the world's largest software marketplace catering to over 100 million buyers yearly, selected Paubox among the world's elite software products. This acknowledgement is particularly notable given that less than 1% of the 175,000+ software products reviewed received such recognition.
